session.user: Run the ty type checker on the new and modified files and report results: ``` cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && ty check src/erk/cli/commands/land_stack.py src/erk/cli/commands/land_cmd.py tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_stack.py 2>&1 | head -100 ```
session.assistant: I'll run the type checker on those files using the devrun pattern.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ty check src/erk/cli/commands/land_stack.py src/erk/cli/commands/land_cmd.py tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_stack.py 2>&1 | head -100

session.assistant:
Excellent!
